hero.name: Arvindhan
hero.description: Class 11 Student @ Sandipani Vidyalaya | IoT Systems Engineer | Full-Stack Developer

about.bio: I am a Class 11 student at Sandipani Vidyalaya, formerly achieving academic excellence at Jawahar Vidyalaya (up to Class 10). My work lies at the intersection of Condensed Matter Physics and Embedded Systems. I don't just learn theory; I apply it to build integrated IoT solutions, from environmental drone payloads to secure communication platforms.
about.personal_story: My journey began with a curiosity about the fundamental laws of the universe. This drove me to explore how physics principles govern electronics. Today, I actively research topics like Quantum Mechanics and Thermodynamics while prototyping practical hardware solutions.

timeline.desc: Studying at Sandipani Vidyalaya. Focusing on core Physics/Math fundamentals. Building advanced electronics prototypes and preparing for Olympiads.
Completed the IITM Online Course on Electronic Systems (6-week intensive). Focused on embedded system design, circuit analysis, and hardware-software integration.
Completed the IITM Data Science Course (6-week intensive). Gained proficiency in statistical modeling, data visualization, and Python-based analytics.
Winner (1st Place): School Project Competition for GAIA Sentinel (IoT Drone System). Developed OOP Python projects and basic hardware prototypes.
Completed Class 10 at Jawahar Vidyalaya with distinction (476/500 - 95.2%). Established strong fundamentals in Physics and Math.

projects.title: GAIA Sentinel
projects.description: A pioneering autonomous environmental monitoring system. GAIA Sentinel integrates ESP32-based drone payloads with a ground sensor network to capture real-time, hyper-local air quality (MQ135) and water quality data. The system features cloud telemetry for instant data visualization and analysis, designed to aid in rapid environmental assessment.

projects.title: Secure Messenger
projects.description: Real-time group messaging platform featuring End-to-End encryption and admin data visualization.

projects.title: Study Companion
projects.description: Integrated productivity suite with Pomodoro timer, Lofi music player, and task management tools.
